# lc-base-template

> Starter template for building accessible, interactive language-course exercise
> engines with React, TypeScript and Vite. Each engine is a self-contained,
> keyboard-operable, WCAG-conscious component driven by validated JSON content.

## Pages

- [Home](/index.html): Vite + React starter entry point for the template.
- [Exercise showcase](/exercise-showcase.html): Live gallery rendering every exercise engine with sample content.

## Engines

Flashcards, dictation, memory match, drag-to-fill gaps, word order, word spot,
line match, phrase reorder, radio quiz, and reading comprehension. Each lives under
`src/exercises/<engine>/` with a pure grader plus a thin React view.

## Notes

- UI chrome strings resolve through `src/config/ui-strings.ts` (English by default);
  authored content carries the target language via `lang` attributes.
- Design tokens and theme colours live in `src/styles/`.
